$description: Historian-Sink-Template via NATS JetStream durable consumer + TimescaleDB. Parallel to historians/postgresql/historian-template.json — same target table (uns_history) but reading from a JetStream consumer instead of an MQTT subscription. Used when the IPC's transport is 'nats' (or 'both' with this as the historian path).

tableStructure.$note: Same 1:1 shape as the postgresql historian template — fed by either MQTT or NATS, the historian table doesn't care.

subjectParser.$description: If headers are missing (older publishers), fall back to subject parsing. Subjects are dot-separated, 7-segment ISA-95 hierarchy.

description: JetStream-backed historian write — durable, replayable, ack-on-insert. Writes to the same uns_history hypertable as the MQTT historian. NR-flow pattern: i3x-jetstream-sub-durable → row-builder → batch → postgres-insert → ack.
